tools.name: lendingRequests.getAlmawsV1TaskListsRsLendingRequests
tools.description: This API returns a list of lending requests in Alma

tools.name: lendingRequests.postAlmawsV1TaskListsRsLendingRequests
tools.description: This API preforms the requested action on a list (specified by given filters) of lending requests in Alma

tools.name: printouts.getAlmawsV1TaskListsPrintouts
tools.description: This API returns a list of Printouts.

tools.name: printouts.getAlmawsV1TaskListsPrintoutsPrintoutId
tools.description: This Web service returns a Printout given a Printout ID.

tools.name: printouts.postAlmawsV1TaskListsPrintouts
tools.description: This API performs an action on printouts: mark as printed or canceled. 10,000 records can be handled in one requests. Only printouts which were updated will be returned.

tools.name: printouts.postAlmawsV1TaskListsPrintoutsPrintoutId
tools.description: This API operates on an printout. given a Printout ID.

tools.name: requestedResources.getAlmawsV1TaskListsRequestedResources
tools.description: This API returns a list of requested resources to be picked from the shelf in Alma

tools.name: requestedResources.postAlmawsV1TaskListsRequestedResources
tools.description: This API performs an action on requested resources that are on the shelf in Alma

tools.name: test.getAlmawsV1TaskListsTest
tools.description: This API is used to test if the API key was configured correctly.It returns a short XML (no schema available - the output is subject to changes) with the following structure:<test>GET - OK - institutionCode: 01ABC_INST</test>

tools.name: test.postAlmawsV1TaskListsTest
tools.description: This API is used to test if the API key was configured correctly, including read/write permissions.It returns a short XML (no schema available - the output is subject to changes) with the following structure:<test>POST - OK</test>

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
